hero.title: Experiments Lab
hero.description: A controlled environment for rendering research, motion systems and interactive prototypes. Each entry represents a technical study.

items.title: Booking Platform Simulation
items.description: End-to-end booking UI simulation including search, availability calendar, pricing logic, multi-step flow and payment states.

items.title: Scroll Physics Engine
items.description: Custom inertia-based scroll behavior using velocity tracking and frame interpolation.

items.title: Shader Noise Study
items.description: Fragment shader experiment exploring procedural noise and dynamic color blending.

items.title: 3D Layout Morph
items.description: FLIP-based transformation system between grid and compact layouts.
